words.def: (linguistics) the form of a word after all affixes are removed
words.zh: n. 樹管；阻擋物；莖（stem的複數）

words.def: a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used
words.zh: n. 集合, 設定（set的複數）

words.def: a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used
words.zh: n. 日落, 同夥, 組合, 集合, 裝置
